title: Blooming Biosphere
description: An overworld biome overhaul, enhancing vanilla's feel with new detail and vegetation
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b663312774b73a92f40895aea641871b20a7814_0.webp)
---
# 🌱 Overview

An overworld worldgen datapack, aiming to upgrade the detail and atmosphere of each of the overworld's biomes while still staying close to the vanilla aesthetic. This **overhauls every overworld biome** and adds **7 brand new biomes!** 

Additionally, this only uses vanilla blocks, which means that vanilla clients can join a server with it without having to install it themselves.



---
# 🍄 Features

- Diverse biome generation with details like fallen logs, boulders, coarse dirt, stone formations, and unique flowers for every biome.
- Vastly improved trees for each biome, with a variety of variants
- 7 brand new biomes added, complementing the overworld's existing biomes
- New stone-lined cliff formations, making previous dirt cliffs now made of stone
- Improved biome placement for biomes such as swamps and mangrove swamps, which now spawn more reliably closer to the ocean.
- Gameplay impacts: find naturally spawning green frogs in rainforests, pale gardens in frozen regions, mycelium patches underground, and packed mud in jungles.
- Improved colors for the sky, fog, grass, and foliage of biomes.
- Attention to detail, with every corner of the overworld being given more polish and each biome standing out from each other.

---

# ⛰️ +Tectonic

Download the [Blooming Biosphere & Tectonic Compatibility](https://modrinth.com/datapack/compatibility-blooming-biosphere-tectonic) to use the two packs together. Make sure the Compatibility pack is **placed above** blooming biosphere and tectonic in your pack order!

*Note: Without compatibility, BB and Tectonic can work together with BB above tectonic, but many tectonic features may be lost*

# 🌲 Growing Trees / Saplings
For added functionality to grow trees from this pack using saplings, download the addon [Custom Biome Saplings](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith-biome-saplings)

Also compatible with [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)

---



---

# Compatiblity
- No new blocks! Works on vanilla and can be placed on just server-side
- Overrides biome layout to add/modify biomes, meaning this is incompatible with other biome changing datapacks/mods unless they have specific compat or you use a blending tool (like terrablender)  

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a81bec138c36a57ea937c23d3478ecf01de0426.png)

Questions/support for Blooming Biosphere are open to ask on the limesplatus discord:
